ROOM_EMPTY_BASELINE.purpose: Measure whether the sensor reports presence while the room is actually empty.
setup: Close the door and verify that no person remains in the room.
Stop or immobilize fans, moving curtains, and other movable objects when possible.
Leave the room before starting the recording.
during_capture: Keep the room empty for the entire recorded interval.
Do not pass in front of the door, nearby walls, or the direct sensor field.
invalid_if: a person enters the room
the door is opened
unexpected movement occurs near the sensor

ENTER_ROOM.purpose: Measure detection onset when one person enters the room.
setup: Leave the room empty and stand outside the door.
Keep the door in the state required by the test plan.
Use the reference door-inside point or record a corrected fixed endpoint.
during_capture: At the start signal, enter at a normal walking pace.
Reach the fixed endpoint without stopping on the threshold.
Remain inside the test area until the recording ends.
invalid_if: you enter before the recorded start
another person enters the sensor field
the path changes between repetitions

MOVING_LATERAL.purpose: Measure presence continuity during transverse movement across the room.
setup: Close the door and stand at one end of the documented lateral path.
Keep the sensor, furniture, and path unchanged between repetitions.
during_capture: Walk laterally across the test path at a normal pace.
Reverse direction at the documented endpoints without leaving the room.
invalid_if: you leave the documented path
you run or remain stopped for a prolonged period
another person enters the sensor field

MOVING_APPROACH.purpose: Measure sensor behavior while one person approaches and moves away from the doorway-mounted sensor.
setup: Use the documented near and far points from the effective environment profile.
Stand at the far point before the recording starts.
during_capture: Walk from the far point to the near point at a normal pace.
Return to the far point and repeat without leaving the room.
invalid_if: you pass the documented near point
the path is obstructed
another person enters the sensor field

SEATED_STILL.purpose: Measure whether presence remains asserted while one person is seated and substantially still.
setup: Place a chair at the documented seated point and do not move it between repetitions.
Sit before the recording starts, with the door closed and a normal posture.
during_capture: Remain seated without deliberate large movements.
Breathe normally and keep the posture as stable as practical.
invalid_if: you stand up or move the chair
you make repeated large movements
another person enters the room

MICRO_MOVEMENT.purpose: Measure presence while one seated person performs small realistic work or reading movements.
setup: Sit at the same fixed point used for the seated-still test.
Prepare one repeatable light activity, such as typing or turning pages.
during_capture: Remain seated and perform only the declared light activity.
Avoid large torso or leg movements.
invalid_if: the activity changes during the interval
you stand up
another person enters the room

EXIT_CLEAR.purpose: Measure how the reported state clears after the person leaves the room.
setup: Stand at the documented internal test point while the sensor is already reporting presence.
Keep the path to the door clear.
during_capture: At the start signal, leave the room at a normal walking pace.
Close the door and remain away from the doorway and adjacent wall until the recording ends.
invalid_if: you remain on the threshold
the door is reopened
another person enters or passes close to the controlled area

ADJACENT_DOOR_CLOSED.purpose: Measure whether movement outside the room is misclassified as internal presence while the door is closed.
setup: Leave the room empty and close the door completely.
Document one adjacent external path and reuse it for every repetition.
during_capture: Walk back and forth along the external path at a normal pace.
Do not open the door or enter the room.
invalid_if: the door opens
a person remains inside the room
the external path changes between repetitions

ADJACENT_DOOR_OPEN.purpose: Measure how far detection extends beyond the room boundary while the door is open.
setup: Leave the room empty and open the door to the same documented angle for every repetition.
Document an external path that does not cross the threshold.
during_capture: Walk along the external path without crossing the threshold.
Keep the door opening unchanged.
invalid_if: you cross the threshold
the door position changes
another person enters the room

WALL_MOVEMENT.purpose: Measure whether movement behind an adjacent wall produces a presence report inside the room.
setup: Leave the sensor room empty and close the door.
Document the path behind the nearest wall and identify which wall separates it from the sensor.
during_capture: Walk back and forth behind the wall without entering the sensor room.
Use the same path and pace for every repetition.
invalid_if: the sensor room does not remain empty
the door is opened
the side of the wall containing the movement is not documented

NON_HUMAN_INTERFERENCE.purpose: Measure whether one documented moving non-human object produces false presence.
setup: Leave the room empty.
Place and document one moving object, such as a curtain moved by a fan.
Keep the object's speed and configuration unchanged.
during_capture: Activate only the documented object.
Do not enter the room during the recording.
invalid_if: a person enters the room
objects other than the declared object move
the interference configuration changes during the interval

REBOOT_PERSISTENCE.purpose: Verify that evidence collection resumes after a reset and observe whether sensor behavior remains consistent.
setup: Remain in the test area while moving normally.
Before starting, record whether the reset targets the ESP32-C3 or the sensor power.
during_capture: Perform exactly one declared reset when instructed by the runtime.
Continue normal movement while the collector waits for reconnection.
invalid_if: multiple resets are performed
the wiring changes during the test
the reset target is not recorded

DIGITAL_UART_CONSISTENCY.purpose: Compare the LD2410C digital output with presence derived from UART frames.
setup: Enable both channels only after pinout and logic levels have been verified.
Start with an empty room and define one fixed internal occupied point.
during_capture: Alternate a clearly occupied period inside the room with a clearly empty period outside the room.
Keep each period long enough to observe both channels.
invalid_if: either channel is disconnected or disabled
the transition between occupied and empty is not clearly executed
the wiring changes during the interval
